import re, unicodedata, json, math, difflib

def strip_tashkeel(s):
    # remove combining marks Arabic diacritics
    return ''.join(ch for ch in unicodedata.normalize('NFD', s) if not unicodedata.combining(ch))

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if not s: return ""
    s = s.strip()
    # remove punctuation and tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)  # keep Arabic letters and digits and underscores
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي').replace('ة','ه') # unify ta marbuta to ha
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = s.replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ٮ','ب').replace('ٯ','ف')  # just in case
    # remove diacritics
    s = strip_tashkeel(s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s)
    return s.lower()

target_full = "لا البخل حرام، ولكن البخل حرام"
target_snippet = "لا البخل ح...البخل حرام"  # but we use only letters
nf = normalize_arabic(target_full)

import unicodedata
def remove_punct(s):
    return ''.join(ch for ch in s if unicodedata.category(ch)[0] != 'P')
def normalize_arabic_full(s):
    if not s: return ""
    s = s.strip()
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    s = remove_punct(s)
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = s.replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = strip_tashkeel(s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s)
    return s.lower()
